overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person journey from a desert highway with overhead billboards, across the road, and up a rocky hillside to reveal a panoramic view of the futuristic Night City skyline. The clip features bright clear weather, industrial power infrastructure, and sparse desert vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with overhead billboard structure

events.description: white van drives past on the highway from left to right
black car drives past on the highway from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the roadside under the large billboard structure, moving toward the distant city

notable_agents.action: white van traveling along the highway passing the camera position

entered.detail: large metal framework supporting two digital billboards spanning across the highway
large digital screen displaying military recruitment advertisement with figures and flag motif
large digital screen displaying portrait of a man with text overlay
tall industrial electricity pylons with multiple power lines stretching across the landscape
reddish rocky terrain with sparse desert vegetation rising on the right side
paved multi-lane road with lane markings running parallel to the camera path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway scene with the camera walking forward under a massive overhead billboard structure. Two large digital billboards display advertisements while industrial power pylons stand on the left. Sparse desert vegetation and rocky hills frame the right side as vehicles occasionally pass on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway crossing approaching rocky desert terrain

events.description: passing the overhead billboard structure and approaching the rocky hillside
crossing the asphalt highway from the roadside toward the desert hillside

agents.ego_description: moving past the billboard structure and crossing the highway to approach the rocky hillside ascent

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the highway passing from left to right

entered.detail: dry dirt and rocky ground at the base of the hillside with scattered shrubs

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the billboard structure and crosses the asphalt highway, transitioning from the roadside to the desert terrain. The rocky hillside that was distant now dominates the foreground as the camera approaches the base of the slope. Power transmission towers remain visible on the left while vehicles continue to pass on the road behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert hillside with sparse vegetation

events.description: beginning steep ascent up the rocky hillside leaving the highway behind

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the rocky desert slope, navigating around shrubs and uneven terrain toward the hilltop

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the rocky hillside, leaving the highway behind as the terrain shifts to loose dirt and scattered boulders. Sparse desert vegetation including yucca plants dots the slope. The power transmission towers remain visible to the left while the futuristic city skyline becomes increasingly prominent in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop overlook of futuristic cyberpunk city

events.description: reaching hilltop crest revealing expansive panoramic view of the cyberpunk city skyline

agents.ego_description: reaching the crest of the hill and pausing to view the expansive futuristic cityscape below

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades, neon signs, and towering buildings filling the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera crests the hilltop, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. The rocky desert terrain gives way to a commanding vista of towering glass skyscrapers, neon-lit buildings, and dense urban architecture in the distance. The scene transitions from natural desert wilderness to the edge of a futuristic civilization.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate desert highway that gradually ascends to reveal a sprawling futuristic metropolis. It begins by walking forward under massive digital billboards and industrial power pylons, with sparse vegetation and rocky hills framing the roadside. As the camera moves past the billboard structure, it crosses the asphalt highway and transitions from the road onto the rugged desert terrain. The scene then shifts as the camera climbs a rocky hillside of loose dirt and yucca plants, leaving the highway behind while the distant city skyline becomes increasingly prominent. Finally, the camera crests the hilltop to reveal a breathtaking panoramic vista of towering glass skyscrapers and neon-lit architecture, completing the transition from natural wilderness to the edge of a cyberpunk civilization.
